title: "Aliens Are Humans From The Future!" (Ft. Mike Masters & David Grusch)
summary: Dr. Michael P. Masters, a biological anthropologist, discusses his theory that UFOs are piloted by time-traveling future humans rather than extraterrestrials. The interview covers evolutionary evidence for the 'gray alien' phenotype, abduction experiences involving genetic sampling, the physics of time travel craft, and Masters' own personal contact experience with alleged future humans.
organizations_mentioned: FREE (Foundation for Research into Extraterrestrial and Extraordinary Experiences)
